description: Interesting scenario: strategy=merge_content concatenates / unions content and metadata across the canonical and duplicates instead of discarding them. Useful when each duplicate carries unique facts that should survive.
notes: merge_content semantics (kickoff spec is silent): backends MUST union metadata keys (last-write-wins on conflict, ordered by created_at ascending) and MAY concatenate content with a newline separator. See Editor's note in docs/spec/v0.md §3.4. confidence on the canonical becomes max(confidence) over all merged rows.
